message.playfulhusbandry.heirlooms_limit: This animal is filled to the brim with magic energy.
message.playfulhusbandry.incest_warning: This animal is a product of inbreeding, so its stats might be unusual.
message.playfulhusbandry.farmer_lens.inv: Shouldn't you use this on an animal?
message.playfulhusbandry.farmer_lens.wat: I appreciate your enthusiasm, but I don't think this is the right kind of animal.
